name: Bailey's Irish Cream Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chocolate chips, marshmallow fluff, vanilla, Bailey's, and nuts. Set aside.
2. Melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Gradually add the sugar and evaporated milk, stirring until the mixture comes to a boil.
3. Reduce the heat and simmer for 11 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Pour the hot mixture over the chocolate mixture in the large bowl. Stir slowly until all ingredients are well combined.
5. Pour the fudge into a buttered baking dish (9x13-inch or 10x15-inch) and chill.
6. The fudge will set and firm up as it cools. It should make about 5 pounds.
